core_mechanism: minimax (worst-case) optimization of an action over an ambiguity/credal set of admissible probability distributions, collapsing to expected-value optimization under a single posterior when the set of distributions reduces to a point
brief_reason: The abstract's unifying thread is that a risk-neutral agent optimizes expected loss under the posterior while a risk-averse or environment-uncertain agent applies a worst-case decision rule over a prediction/credal (ambiguity) set via distributionally robust optimization, with a certificate bounding the achieved utility.
